displayTitle: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Saber for Hire
synopsis: The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire 3 is the third issue of the canon comic book miniseries Star Wars: The High Republic Adventures – Saber for Hire. The issue was written by Cavan Scott, illustrated by Rachael Stott, Nicola Righi, and Vita Efremoova, and published by Dark Horse Comics on June 26, 2024.
title: The High Republic Adventures Phase III: Saber for Hire
